## What does this PR do?

Describe your changes clearly.

## Which files are affected?

List the templates, presets, or examples changed.

## Security self-review

- [ ] This PR does not weaken any existing security rule
- [ ] This PR does not add permissive defaults
- [ ] New rules include a "why" explanation
- [ ] Checklist items are actionable and verifiable
- [ ] Code examples include security-relevant comments
- [ ] Stack-specific content is in presets, not main templates

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (typo, incorrect guidance)
- [ ] New template
- [ ] New stack preset
- [ ] New code example
- [ ] Improvement to existing template
